cbioportal.description: cBioPortal cancer genomics database with async API support

chembl.description: ChEMBL chemical database with 27 drug discovery tools

pubmed.description: PubMed biomedical literature search. BEST FOR: Clinical studies, research papers, systematic reviews. NOT FOR: Full-text papers (use paper-qa-mcp). Returns: Article metadata, abstracts, PMIDs.

uniprot.description: UniProt protein database with 26 bioinformatics tools

reactome-server.description: Reactome biological pathway database. BEST FOR: Pathway analysis, reaction networks, biological processes. NOT FOR: Metabolic pathways only (use KEGG). Returns: Pathways, reactions, entities.

clinicaltrials.description: ClinicalTrials.gov trial registry search. BEST FOR: Active/completed trials, eligibility criteria, trial status. NOT FOR: Raw trial data (use AACT). Returns: Trial summaries, NCT IDs, study details.

pubchem.description: PubChem chemical compound database. BEST FOR: Chemical structures, properties, safety data. NOT FOR: Bioactivity data (use ChEMBL). Returns: Compound info, CIDs, 2D/3D structures.
